text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
In a nine-ball game of pool, you don't simply
pocket the nine-ball.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Keeping a streak, hitting in order, not missing
once... That's what it's all about.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
The rule? You've got to take the lead and keep
it—as pure and simple as it gets.
